title: 11 fixes — Toast dedupe, ESC closes modals, broken-image fallbacks, abort timeouts
notes: FIX: Toast notifications no longer stack endlessly on rapid action — same toast within 1s is deduped, max 3 visible at once.

FIX: ESC key now closes Report modal, Phone-code picker, Timezone picker, Followers list, Post-detail, Edit-post, Notifications panel, Comments panel, and chat 3-dot menu — was previously only closeable via X button.
FIX: All modals now lock body scroll while open — no more accidentally scrolling the screen behind the modal.
FIX: Avatar uploads no longer get stuck on the spinner in Safari private mode / when storage is full (was crashing the success handler via unwrapped localStorage.setItem).
FIX: 'Clear all messages' no longer uses native window.confirm (which blocked the JS thread + looked system-y on Android). Now in-app modal.

FIX: Report button — submit now has 10s timeout (fall back to local-save instead of hanging forever) + 60s per-target dedupe (can't accidentally double-report by tapping twice) + X button now closable mid-submit (was trapped).

FIX: Broken-image icons in 15+ places (followers list, saved posts, in-call expert avatars, chat avatars, chat-image bubbles, moments viewer, share sheet) — now show clean initials or 'Image unavailable' instead of broken-icon when Supabase signed URL expires.
POLISH: Notifications panel, post timestamps, wallet transactions, saved posts dates now respect your selected timezone (was always showing device-local).
POLISH: Toast dedupe — won't see the same error message stacked 8 times on bad network.
